# scm_data_object (Data Source)

DataObject data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Replace the ID with the UUID of the SCM Data Object you want to find.
data "scm_data_object" "scm_data_object_get" {
  id = "b1398675-254e-4eff-8050-007ef2f9c0a1"
}

# Output the details of the single SCM Dataobject found.
output "scm_data_object_details" {
  description = "The pattern_type of the single data object fetched by ID."
  value       = data.scm_data_object.scm_data_object_get.pattern_type
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The UUID of the data object

### Optional

- `device` (String) The device in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.
- `folder` (String) The folder in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.
- `name` (String) The name of the data object
- `snippet` (String) The snippet in which the resource is defined

> ℹ️ **Note:** You must specify exactly one of `device`, `folder`, and `snippet`.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the data object
- `disable_override` (String) Disable override
- `pattern_type` (Attributes) Pattern type (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pattern_type))
- `tfid` (String) The Terraform ID.

<a id="nestedatt--pattern_type"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pattern_type`

Read-Only:

- `file_properties` (Attributes) File properties (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pattern_type--file_properties))
- `predefined` (Attributes) Predefined (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pattern_type--predefined))
- `regex` (Attributes) Regex (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pattern_type--regex))

<a id="nestedatt--pattern_type--file_properties"></a>

Read-Only:

Read-Only:
